source_pr.title: planner: Log warnings when agg function can not be pushdown in explain statement
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:
After #22713, if an expression can not be pushdown to storage layer, it will log a warning if current sql is an explain statement, however, for aggregation function `agg(expr)` if it can not be pushdown to storage layer becuase `expr` is not supported, no warning is logged because [current implementation](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/5645edeec639b68f521e12db2d6d49a77b5a9d6e/planner/core/task.go#L1411) call `AggFuncToPBExpr ` directly to check if the agg function can be pushed to storage layer.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

Refine `CheckAggCanPushCop ` and log warnings when agg function can not be pushdown in explain statement.
How it Works:

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Log warnings when agg function can not be pushdown in explain statement

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: - c.Skip("unstable, skip race test").

evidence: files: cmd/explaintest/r/partition_pruning.result, cmd/explaintest/t/partition_pruning.test, ddl/column_type_change_test.go, ddl/db_change_test.go, distsql/distsql.go, domain/sysvar_cache.go, executor/builder.go, executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go, executor/set.go, executor/show_test.go, executor/tiflash_test.go, expression/builtin_like_test.go, expression/integration_test.go, go.mod, infoschema/tables.go, planner/core/exhaust_physical_plans.go, planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go, planner/core/point_get_plan_test.go, planner/core/preprocess.go, planner/core/task.go, planner/core/testdata/enforce_mpp_suite_out.json, planner/core/testdata/integration_serial_suite_in.json, planner/core/testdata/integration_serial_suite_out.json, server/tidb_test.go, session/session.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, store/copr/mpp.go, store/driver/txn/snapshot.go, structure/type.go, util/stringutil/string_util.go, util/stringutil/string_util_test.go
